name: AFI Agri Cohort 25-26
description: A 5-month accelerator program for startups in precision agriculture, automation, agri financing, or dairy & cattle management in India.

name: SAREP Partnership Fund
description: Funding for market-based transformative solutions that enable the clean energy transition, increased deployment of advanced energy solutions, and climate resilience in South Asia.

name: Keeling Curve Prize 2026
description: Awards for innovative climate solutions globally that reduce atmospheric CO2 and other greenhouse gases across categories including Energy, Carbon Sinks, and Finance.

name: India Australia RISE Accelerator (Round 4: Alumni Scale-up)
description: Accelerator program aimed at fast-tracking cross-border expansion for climate and environment tech startups from Australia or India.

name: Amazon Devices Climate Tech Accelerator 2026
description: Global accelerator focused on devices, semiconductors, low-carbon materials, and AI to reduce the carbon footprint of devices.

name: AI4Good AgriTech Farmer Solutions
description: Grants for developing digital advisory tools and AI solutions targeted at smallholder farmers in developing countries.

name: Greenovation Agrivoltaics Challenge
description: Challenge funding for Indian startups innovating in climate-resilient agriculture and agrivoltaics (renewable energy).

name: AI for ALL: Global Impact Challenge
description: A global challenge awarding top teams for building impactful AI solutions in sectors such as agriculture, healthcare, and education.

name: Aspire Climatetech Program Spring 2026
description: A 5-week hybrid accelerator for science and engineering startups tackling climate change, sustainability, pollution, and energy issues.

name: Rev: Ithaca Startup Works 2026 Prototyping Hardware Accelerator
description: Free 10-week summer accelerator offering prototyping funds for physical product concepts with dedicated tracks in ClimateTech and AgTech.
